name: Swedish Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and pour into a 11 x 8 x 3-inch casserole or pan (use this specific size; do not use a larger pan as the custard layer will be too shallow).
2. Set aside.
3. In the top of a double boiler, combine rice and 1 cup milk. Cover and cook over simmering water until rice is tender, about 45 minutes. Pour into prepared pan.
4. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
5. In a mixer bowl, lightly beat eggs until frothy. Add sugar, vanilla, butter, salt, and remaining milk; mix well.
6. Pour mixture over rice and sprinkle cinnamon generously on top (do not stir in).
7. Place dish in a pan of hot water (about halfway up the sides). Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until pudding is slightly puffy and firm on top.
8. Remove from hot water and cool on a rack. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
